members.name: _LoadLayoutFromConfig
members.summary: Implement this method to handle loading this dock's layout. It's equivalent to [method EditorPlugin._set_window_layout]. [param section] is a unique section based on [member layout_key].

members.name: _SaveLayoutToConfig
members.summary: Implement this method to handle saving this dock's layout. It's equivalent to [method EditorPlugin._get_window_layout]. [param section] is a unique section based on [member layout_key].

members.name: _UpdateLayout
members.summary: Implement this method to handle the layout switching for this dock. [param layout] is one of the [enum DockLayout] constants. [codeblock] func _update_layout(layout): box_container.vertical = (layout == DOCK_LAYOUT_VERTICAL) [/codeblock]

members.name: Close
members.summary: Closes the dock, making its tab hidden.

members.name: MakeVisible
members.summary: Focuses the dock's tab (or window if it's floating). If the dock was closed, it will be opened. If it's a bottom dock, makes the bottom panel visible.

members.name: Open
members.summary: Opens the dock. It will appear in the last used dock slot. If the dock has no default slot, it will be opened floating. [b]Note:[/b] This does not focus the dock. If you want to open and focus the dock, use [method make_visible].

members.name: AvailableLayouts
members.summary: The available layouts for this dock, as a bitmask. By default, the dock allows vertical and floating layouts.

members.name: Closable
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the dock can be closed with the Close button in the context popup. Docks with [member global] enabled are always closable.

members.name: DefaultSlot
members.summary: The default dock slot used when adding the dock with [method EditorPlugin.add_dock]. After the dock is added, it can be moved to a different slot and the editor will automatically remember its position between sessions. If you remove and re-add the dock, it will be reset to default.

members.name: DockIcon
members.summary: The icon for the dock, as a texture. If specified, it will override [member icon_name].

members.name: DockShortcut
members.summary: The shortcut used to open the dock.

members.name: ForceShowIcon
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the dock will always display an icon, regardless of [member EditorSettings.interface/editor/docks/dock_tab_style] or [member EditorSettings.interface/editor/docks/bottom_dock_tab_style].

members.name: Global
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the dock appears in the [b]Editor > Editor Docks[/b] menu and can be closed. Non-global docks can still be closed using [method close] or when [member closable] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: IconName
members.summary: The icon for the dock, as a name from the [code]EditorIcons[/code] theme type in the editor theme. You can find the list of available icons [url=https://godot-editor-icons.github.io/]here[/url].

members.name: LayoutKey
members.summary: The key representing this dock in the editor's layout file. If empty, the dock's displayed name will be used instead.

members.name: Title
members.summary: The title of the dock's tab. If empty, the dock's [member Node.name] will be used. If the name is auto-generated (contains [code]@[/code]), the first child's name will be used instead.

members.name: TitleColor
members.summary: The color of the dock tab's title. If its alpha is [code]0.0[/code], the default font color will be used.

members.name: Transient
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the dock is not automatically opened or closed when loading an editor layout, only moved. It also can't be opened using a shortcut. This is meant for docks that are opened and closed in specific cases, such as when selecting a [TileMap] or [AnimationTree] node.

signals.name: Closed
signals.summary: Emitted when the dock is closed with the Close button in the context popup, before it's removed from its parent. See [member closable].

signals.name: Opened
signals.summary: Emitted when the dock is opened via the Editor > Editor Docks menu, before it's made visible.

values.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_ALL
values.summary: Allows placing the dock in all available slots.

values.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_FLOATING
values.summary: Allows making the dock floating (opened as a separate window).

values.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_HORIZONTAL
values.summary: Allows placing the dock in the horizontal dock slots at the bottom.

values.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_VERTICAL
values.summary: Allows placing the dock in the vertical dock slots on either side of the editor.

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_BOTTOM_L
values.summary: Dock slot at the bottom, below bottom panel, on the left side.

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_BOTTOM_R
values.summary: Dock slot at the bottom, below bottom panel, on the right side.

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_BL
values.summary: Dock slot, left side, bottom-left (empty in default layout).

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_BR
values.summary: Dock slot, left side, bottom-right (in default layout includes FileSystem and History docks).

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_UL
values.summary: Dock slot, left side, upper-left (empty in default layout).

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_UR
values.summary: Dock slot, left side, upper-right (in default layout includes Scene and Import docks).

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum DockSlot] enum.

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_BL
values.summary: Dock slot, right side, bottom-left (empty in default layout).

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_BR
values.summary: Dock slot, right side, bottom-right (empty in default layout).

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_UL
values.summary: Dock slot, right side, upper-left (in default layout includes Inspector, Signal, and Group docks).

values.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_UR
values.summary: Dock slot, right side, upper-right (empty in default layout).

constants.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_VERTICAL
constants.summary: Allows placing the dock in the vertical dock slots on either side of the editor.

constants.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_HORIZONTAL
constants.summary: Allows placing the dock in the horizontal dock slots at the bottom.

constants.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_FLOATING
constants.summary: Allows making the dock floating (opened as a separate window).

constants.name: DOCK_LAYOUT_ALL
constants.summary: Allows placing the dock in all available slots.

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_UL
constants.summary: Dock slot, left side, upper-left (empty in default layout).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_BL
constants.summary: Dock slot, left side, bottom-left (empty in default layout).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_UR
constants.summary: Dock slot, left side, upper-right (in default layout includes Scene and Import docks).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_LEFT_BR
constants.summary: Dock slot, left side, bottom-right (in default layout includes FileSystem and History docks).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_UL
constants.summary: Dock slot, right side, upper-left (in default layout includes Inspector, Signal, and Group docks).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_BL
constants.summary: Dock slot, right side, bottom-left (empty in default layout).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_UR
constants.summary: Dock slot, right side, upper-right (empty in default layout).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_BR
constants.summary: Dock slot, right side, bottom-right (empty in default layout).

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_BOTTOM_L
constants.summary: Dock slot at the bottom, below bottom panel, on the left side.

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_BOTTOM_R
constants.summary: Dock slot at the bottom, below bottom panel, on the right side.

constants.name: DOCK_SLOT_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum DockSlot] enum.
